The Operating System for Every Mind

AstraOS brings focus, intelligence, and balance into one AI command center — built for anyone who wants to think clearer and work smarter.

The Problem

Modern life is controlled chaos.

Forty browser tabs. Three deadline notifications. Unorganized notes scattered across seven apps. Burnout disguised as productivity. Whether you're a student, professional, or creator — you're not failing. You're missing the right system.


AstraOS was built to change that.

⚠️ Deadline noise everywhere
💀 Pressure before big work
📂 Where did I save that PDF?
😶 Can't focus. Again.
☕ Energy running on fumes
The AstraOS Modules

Six systems.
One command center.

Each module uses AI to adapt to how your brain works — whether you're studying, building, creating, or leading.

📺
FocusTube
Paste any YouTube URL. AstraOS strips distractions and transforms it into a cinematic learning environment with AI-generated notes and timestamps — perfect for learners, researchers, and professionals alike.
LEARNING ENGINE
🧠
AI Vault — Your Second Brain
Drop in any note, PDF, or research paper. The AI Vault reads it, tags it, links it to related concepts, and surfaces exactly what you need when you need it. For students, writers, analysts, and teams — never search for a file again.
KNOWLEDGE INTELLIGENCE
🎯
Focus Engine
AstraOS detects when your attention drifts and activates deep focus mode — silencing noise, dimming distractions, and locking in flow state. Works for deep work sessions, study blocks, creative sprints, and long coding sessions.
DEEP FOCUS
🌿
Entertainment Arena
Rest is productivity. The Arena uses AI to suggest the perfect stress-relief activity based on your current burnout level and energy state — for anyone who works hard and needs to recharge smart.
WELLNESS AI
💡
AI Knowledge Assistant
Upload any material — a course, a book, a brief, a report — and instantly receive summaries, flashcards, practice quizzes, and a customized learning or revision plan tailored to your goal.
STUDY AUTOMATION
❤️
Health & Mind Monitor
Tracks posture warnings, hydration reminders, screen fatigue, and predicts burnout before it happens. Your AI wellness co-pilot — for professionals, freelancers, and anyone who spends long hours at a screen.
HEALTH INTELLIGENCE
Live AI Demo

Watch AstraOS
think in real-time.

Type a single request. Watch AstraOS generate an entire productivity system around you — no matter who you are or what you do.
